/CAL: POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT IN JERICHO PROJECT,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN JERICHO PROJECT,/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/

/CAL: STATUS/DAWT/X: REPORT RECEIVED REFLECTS THAT DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT AT JERRICHO HOUSE,/X: COUNSEL SPOKE TO JUDGE DARWIN & A NEW ORDERWAS SIGNED & FILED TODAY/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE PARTICIPATION IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM (JERICHO PROJECT)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: CASE REMAINS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/CONT/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/INTC/X: DEFENDANT RECEIVED APPROVAL FROM THEJERRICHO PROJECT FACILITIES & ASSERTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT WILL BRING DEFENDANT TO THIS TREATMENT FACILITY,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS INPLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF JERRICHO PROJECT FACILITIES UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE & MUST REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT ALL TIMES/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: STATUS/DOPU: IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/

/CAL: PLACEMENT & PROGRAM STATUS/INTC/SHER/SHER2:12-29-21/ BAIL: 25000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/X: LOVE WAIVER/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE INFORMAL DIVERSION/INTC/X:PER COUNSEL, DEFENDANTHAS BEEN ACCEPTED IN THE LATINO COMMISSION PROGRAM TO ENTER TREATMENT AFTERHE HAS A CLEAN COVID TEST/CONTD:PROGRAM STATUS/X:DAW IF IN PROGRAM/

/CAL:PHC/INTC/FAVRPT/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INTO AN INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:PART OF THE NEGOTIATED INFORMAL DIVERSION IS DEFENDANT WILL NOT ENTER PLEA FOR6 MONTHS/X:DEFENDANT MUST NOT PICK UP ANY NEW ARREST LEADING TO NEW CHARGES; MUST NOT VIOLATE STAY AWAY ORDER/X:DEFENDANT MUST PARTICIPATE IN LA CULTURA CURA YOUTH PROGRAM - INSTITUTO FAMILIAR DE LA RAZA/ /CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT RE INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:DAW IF COMPLIANT/

CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCEBY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 08-26-21,/X: BAILSET AT $10000,/DOPC/X: CASE IS IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: PAUL DENNISON/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 10-04-21 (60TH)/X: THE 30TH LAST DAYIS 09-15-21,/987,2/ACM/WS/X: DEFENDANT NOT TO POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS,/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
